word: G14 - ἀγαθοεργέω - agathoergéō - ag-ath-er-gheh'-o - Do good

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἀγαθοεργέω

- Transliteration: Agathoergeo

- Phonetic: ag-ath-er-gheh'-o

- Definition:

1. to work good, to do good, to do well, act rightly

- Origin: from G18 and G2041

- TDNT entry: 01:17,3

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G18 and G2041; to work good: - do good.
